_publications._publicationTitle: Hybridization Capture-Based Next-Generation Sequencing to Evaluate Coding Sequence and Deep Intronic Mutations in the NF1 Gene.

_contextSnippet: Following variant filtering, a total of 3554 variants were identified (≈238/patient)...the number of total variants that were identified was high (average of 238 variants/patient) compared to other studies
details: Following variant filtering, identified total of 3554 variants (≈238/patient) which was high compared to exonic-focused studies (average of 30 variants/patient)
